name: Digital Literacy
description: Learners use digital tools and resources effectively

name: Creativity and Imagination
description: Learners explore different approaches and think innovatively

name: Learning to Learn
description: Learners take responsibility for their own learning

name: Critical Thinking and Problem Solving
description: Learners analyze situations and develop creative solutions

name: Communication and Collaboration
description: Learners work together effectively and share ideas clearly

name: Self-Efficacy
description: Learners develop confidence in their abilities

name: Citizenship
description: Understanding of rights and responsibilities as a citizen and active participation in community affairs.
